meaning: Military Air Transport Service (美国)军事空运局
examples: The floors are covered with woven straw mats.
The food is served on polished tables with mats.
The table mats and coasters have a non-slip, soft green backing.
On woven plastic mats, women pray to a Buddha statue, barely visible through the thick jasmine smoke.
McDonagh moved the puck to Mats Zuccarello, who got it to Nash for the winning play.
